message:
feat(core): add dependency resolver and enhance disclosure system

Add comprehensive dependency resolution and enhance the progressive
disclosure system with full implementation.

src/core/dependencies.rs (new):
- DependencyResolver for skill dependency graphs
- Topological sort for load order calculation
- Cycle detection with helpful error messages
- Transitive dependency resolution
- Version compatibility checking
- Lazy loading support for large graphs

src/core/disclosure.rs:
- Full DisclosureLevel implementation
- Token budget calculation for each level
- Content slicing for progressive revelation
- Mandatory section preservation
- Packing optimization for token limits
- Level auto-selection based on context

src/core/mod.rs:
- Dependencies module export

src/storage/git.rs:
- Enhanced Git operations for skill versioning
- Diff generation between commits
- Blame information for authorship tracking
- Merge conflict detection and resolution
- Hook integration points

src/cli/commands/security.rs:
- Additional security scanning capabilities

This completes the core dependency resolution needed for proper
skill loading order and the disclosure system for context-aware
skill presentation within token budgets.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
